nasb.text: Then Jehoram crossed over with his commanders and all his chariots with him. And he arose by night and struck down the Edomites who were surrounding him and the commanders of the chariots.

esv.text: Then Jehoram passed over with his commanders and all his chariots, and he rose by night and struck the Edomites who had surrounded him and his chariot commanders.

cnv.text: 約蘭率領他的眾軍長和所有的戰車一同前去；他夜間起來，攻擊那些包圍他的以東人和戰車隊長。

ccb.text: 约兰率将领及所有战车前去讨伐，结果被以东人包围。但他们乘夜突出重围。
